contract_meta.phase_name: Workflow Phase 4 — Autonomous Executor & Safe Actions
contract_meta.enhancement: Add a governed automation layer that executes the workflow engine's recommended next actions (lint, tests, contract sync, git commits) with dry-run guardrails and rollback visibility.
contract_meta.rationale: With runtime parity achieved in Phase 3, the remaining blocker for autonomous developer operations is executing the suggested next actions without manual babysitting. This phase delivers a safe executor that reuses the shared PhaseState heuristics, performs validations, and applies commits only when guardrails confirm success—eliminating the human bottleneck called out in the audit logs.

project.name: Autonomous Workflow System
project.goal: Provide a governed CLI (`npm run state:next`) that reads PhaseState, runs required validations, commits passing work, and produces auditable logs so developers and agents can advance roadmap tasks without manual intervention.
project.scope: Implement autonomous executor CLI with dry-run mode, validation + git automation, evidence logging, and integration with runtime workflow metadata.
project.estimated_time: 1-2 hours of scripting plus 1 hour for tests and documentation
project.work_profile: Node.js automation scripts, git integration, Vitest coverage, documentation

execution_model.verification_strategy: Confirm Phase 3 artifacts are active, then iteratively build the autonomous executor with validations at each milestone.
execution_model.description: Leverage shared PhaseState heuristics to execute safe actions (lint/typecheck/test/contract sync/git commit) via a CLI entrypoint with dry-run preview, evidence logging, and rollback guidance.

constraints: Use git CLI available in repo environment

observability.description: Measure autonomous executor runs, validations, and git operations for auditability.

tasks.title: Confirm runtime exposes workflow metadata
tasks.description: Block autonomous execution until Phase 3 integration is active and emitting workflow metadata.

actions.description: Start npm run dev and verify /api/progress includes workflowMetadata.currentGate and suggestedNextAction.

evaluation.intent: Guarantee Phase 4 builds on top of a synchronized runtime + CLI view
evaluation.success_criteria: CLI and runtime both show suggested_next_action

tasks.title: Create state:next CLI with dry-run
tasks.description: Add scripts/state-next.js that loads PhaseState, prints recommended action, and simulates the steps without modifying the workspace.

actions.content_spec: ESM module exporting runStateNext({ dryRun }) and CLI entrypoint supporting --dry-run (default true).

success_criteria: CLI prints recommended action with no mutations

tasks.title: Implement validation + git automation
tasks.description: Teach state:next to run lint/typecheck/tests, call npm run state:sync on success, and create a git branch + commit with evidence summary when not in dry-run mode.

actions.description: Execute validations sequentially with detailed logging and bail out on first failure.
Integrate git add/commit operations using the suggested action metadata (e.g., task id in commit message).
Write execution details to .automation/actions.jsonl for audit trails.

success_criteria: Validations run before any git mutation
On success, git commit uses suggested task id

tasks.title: Add Vitest coverage for autonomous executor
tasks.description: Cover dry-run and live-run paths with mocks for git + child_process, ensuring safety rails and logging.

actions.content_spec: Vitest suite mocking child_process to assert command order, dry-run guard, and logging output.

success_criteria: Tests fail if executor runs git commit before validations

tasks.title: Workflow Phase 4 validation gate
tasks.description: Certify autonomous executor readiness and evidence capture before declaring workflow track complete.

actions.description: Run npm run state:next --dry-run (expect preview only) then npm run state:next (expect validations + commit).

evaluation.intent: Ensure automation operates safely with full evidence trail
evaluation.success_criteria: All validations pass, manual run generates commit + log entry

win_isolation.description: Validate dry-run behavior before enabling live mutations.
win_isolation.implementation: Keep live-run disabled until WF4-W41 + WF4-W42 validations succeed.

WF4-GATE.on_fail: Halt automation; revert git mutations and capture diagnostics in .automation/phase4_autonomous_executor_evaluation.json
WF4-GATE.report: Summarize failure, remediation, and retest plan

phase_specific_constraints.dry_run_default: state-next must default to dry-run unless --live flag passed.

fallback_policies.dry_run_failure: Stop and inspect PhaseState heuristics; do not attempt live mode until resolved.
fallback_policies.validation_failure: Abort automation, fix underlying lint/type/test issue, rerun dry-run.
fallback_policies.git_error: Abort and run git reset --hard HEAD && git clean -fd before retrying.
